# Documentation Example

> Documentation-only project demonstrating the IKE AsciiDoc pipeline.
> Exercises all diagram types, Koncept macros, typography, and layout
> features across all 6 PDF renderers.

## Reports

- [About](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-pipeline/index.html.md)

- [Project Licenses](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-pipeline/licenses.html.md)
- [Maven Coordinates](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-pipeline/dependency-info.html.md)
- [Project Information](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-pipeline/project-info.html.md)
